findings.blocker: Iter-107 plan-mandated option 3 (in-line per-coord scalar pullback at the post-S5 LinearMap-chain frame, wrapper bypassed) failed across 7 routes. Same recurring class of obstructions confirmed: (a) discrim-tree pattern unification on the anonymous-closure Pi.lift codomain blocks rw [ModuleCat.hom_zsmul] / rw [ModuleCat.hom_smul] / Preadditive.zsmul_comp / ← LinearMap.comp_apply / ← ModuleCat.hom_comp; (b) deterministic whnf timeout at 1600000 heartbeats on every chain that reaches the smul-Pi.lift interface; (c) eqToHom proof-object construction for `∏ᶜ (Fin ((prev n) + 2) → s₀) → ModuleCat k` ↔ `∏ᶜ (Fin (n+1) → s₀) → ModuleCat k` family-equality requires Fin.cast, not `omega`. Body-local rfl-helper with free binders (`fun _ _ _ ↦ rfl` packaging) also failed — same root cause as iter-099 E1 dead-end. The progress-critic-iter105 STUCK verdict is reinforced: 7 consecutive PARTIAL iters on this slot (iter-099/100/101/103/105/106/107).

attempts.insight: The type-equality proof obligation decomposes into `Fin ((prev n) + 2) → ↥s₀ = Fin (n+1) → ↥s₀` family equality, which `omega` cannot solve. Object-level eqToHom proofs between `∏ᶜ` products with different Fin-indexing cannot be discharged by `omega` alone; requires explicit Fin.cast-based construction. Reconfirms iter-100 finding on `_`-codomain ascription failure.
